source.title: Dimopoulos & Landsberg — Black Holes at the Large Hadron Collider
fundingDetails: U.S. Department of Energy grant DE-FG02-91ER40688
U.S. National Science Foundation grant PHY-9870115

provenance.quote: The correlation between the black-hole mass and its temperature, deduced from the energy spectrum of the decay products, can test Hawking's evaporation law.

position.quote: The decays of the black holes into final states with prompt, hard photons, electrons, or muons provide a clean signature with low background.

factorWeights.factor: Whether Hawking radiation is guaranteed (black-hole evaporation)
factorWeights.quote: The analysis assumes prompt Hawking evaporation into Standard Model particles.
